component.name: ToonTown MultiTool
component.summary: Multitoon controller for Toontown Rewritten and Corporate Clash

description.p: ToonTown MultiTool lets you launch and control multiple Toontown Rewritten and Corporate Clash accounts at the same time. Broadcast input to up to four background toons, customize per-slot key sets, manage stored accounts via the OS keyring, and track toon stats and invasions live.
